ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock in the stocks table */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES trading_days ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the stock operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the exchange information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "trading_day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading day record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trading day is a holiday */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the trading day information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the permission was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., 'above', 'below') */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value associated with the alert condition */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the stock (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock price */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend, volatility) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the historical data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price for the recorded date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price for the recorded date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price for the recorded date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price for the recorded date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the historical record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the historical data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the index information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that is a member of the index */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the stock became a member of the index */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock ceased to be a member of the index (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the membership information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_memberships_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_memberships_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indexes ("index_id")
)
